title: HttpTransport drops JSON-RPC error data field
description: OC StdioTransport::request (src/mcp.rs:249-259) includes the data field from JSON-RPC errors in the error message. HttpTransport::request (src/mcp.rs:329-332) formats only code and message, silently dropping data. CC (via MCP SDK) preserves the full error object including data. Callers of HTTP-transport servers lose structured error context. Required: include data field in HttpTransport error messages, matching StdioTransport behavior.
